# Vendored third-party assets

These files are bundled locally so the game has **no runtime CDN dependency**.
They are unmodified redistributions of their upstream packages.

| File | Source | Version | License |
|------|--------|---------|---------|
| `peerjs.min.js` | [peerjs](https://www.npmjs.com/package/peerjs) | 1.5.4 | MIT |
| `fonts/orbitron-*.woff2` | [@fontsource/orbitron](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@fontsource/orbitron) (Orbitron by Matt McInerney) | 5.2.5 | SIL Open Font License 1.1 |

Korean UI text falls back to the operating system's sans-serif stack
(Pretendard / Apple SD Gothic Neo / Malgun Gothic / Noto Sans KR).
